title: Kill Statement
parameters: pathName	String expression containing filename to delete.  pathName may include the drive and directory.
description:
Kill Statement

Kill Statement

See_Also Example

Deletes files on a PC disk drive.
see_also:
Del

SavePoints

Kill Statement Example

Function DeleteFile(path$ As String)

  Integer answer

  String msg$

  msg$ = "OK to delete file: '" + path$ + "'?"

  MsgBox msg$, MB_YESNO + MB_ICONQUESTION, "MyApp", answer

  If answer = IDYES Then

    Kill path$

  EndIf

Fend
examples:
Function DeleteFile(path$ As String) Integer answer String msg$ msg$ = "OK to delete file: '" + path$ + "'?" MsgBox msg$, MB_YESNO + MB_ICONQUESTION, "MyApp", answer If answer = IDYES Then
    Kill path$ EndIf
Fend
